title: 1NCE SIM
description: JSON Schema for a 1NCE SIM resource as returned by /v2/sims/{iccid} on api.1nce.com/management-api. Derived from the 1NCE SIM Management v2 OpenAPI document.

SimsSimQuotaStatus.title: Quota Status
SimsSimQuotaStatus.description: Indicates whether more than 20%, less than 20% or 0% of the current quota SMS or data are still available.

id.description:
Numeric indicator for the threshold levels:
  • 0: more than 20%
  • 1: less than 20%
  • 2: 0% remaining

description.description: Text description of the quota status.

threshold_reached_date.description: Date on which the threshold less than 20% of the quota avaliable was reached.

quota_exceeded_date.description: Date on which 100% of the avaliable quota was exceeded.

SimsSim.title: SIM Card
SimsSim.description: Detailed information about a SIM card.

iccid_with_luhn.description: ICCID identifier of the SIM with Luhn check number.

imsi.description: First IMSI of the SIM, used for normal 1NCE network.

imsi_2.description: Second IMSI of the SIM, used for China+ network.

current_imsi.description: Currently active IMSI, dependent on the region where the SIM is used.

imei.description: IMEI of the device in which the SIM is inserted.

imei_lock.description: Indicates if SIM is locked to the current device IMEI.

status.description: The current status of the SIM card.

activation_date.description: The date when the SIM card was activated.

ip_address.description: The fixed IP address of the SIM card.

current_quota.description: The overall set data quota for the SIM in MB.

current_quota_SMS.description: Current SMS Quota for the SIM.

label.description: Label set by the customer in the 1NCE Portal for the SIM.

message.description: Error Message with more details goes here
Error Message with more details goes here

SimsSimUpdateReq.title: SIM Update Request
SimsSimUpdateReq.description: Information about a SIM card based on a SIM update procedure.

label.description: Label of the SIM set by the customer in the 1NCE Portal.

imei_lock.description: Flag that indicates if SIM is locked to the current device IMEI.

status.description: Status of the SIM. A SIM can be enabled (active) or disabled (deactivated).

message.example: Cannot parse parameter per_page as Int: For Input String "abc"
message.description: Error Message with more details goes here
Error Message with more details goes here

volume.description:
Amount left i.e. still available for use:
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.
- can be negative

total_volume.description:
Initially provisioned volume or (in case the quota was topped up) the remaining volume at that time plus the
volume of the topup.
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.

accumulated_total_volume.description: Sum of initially provisioned volume and all topup volumes.

last_volume_added.description:
Amount of SMS or data volume which was last purchased for this SIM:
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.

threshold_percentage.description: Percentage of the [total_volume] for triggering a threshold event.  The threshold event is triggered when the remaining volume reaches or falls below this percentage.

threshold_volume.description:
Calculated upon quota creation and upon quota topup as [total_volume] * [threshold_percentage]:
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.

expiry_date.description: The date when this current quota will expire.

SimsConnectivityStatus.description: The current connectivity status of a SIM.

SimsDataTrafficLimitState.description: Data traffic limit state of the SIM

imsi.description: IMSI of the SIM that triggered the event.

last_updated.description: Timestamp from the last location update.

sgsn_number.description: Serving GPRS Support Node (SGSN) identifier for the SGSN where the SIM is attached.

operator_id.description: Identifier for the current operator the SIM is connected to.

sgsn_ip_address.description: IP address of the used Serving GPRS Support Node (SGSN).

name.description: String name of the operator where the SIM is currently attached to.
String name of the country of the operator where the SIM is currently attached.
String name of the country where the SIM device is currently located.

country_code.description: The international phone number prefix. “49” is the one for Germany, “381” is the one for Serbia.

mcc.description: An MCC (Mobile Country Code) is used in combination with an MNC (a combination known as an "MCC/MNC tuple") to uniquely identify a mobile network operator (carrier) using the GSM (including GSM-R), UMTS, LTE, and 5G public land mobile networks.

pdp_context_id.description: ID of the current PDP Context.

endpoint_id.description: ID of the used SIM endpoint.

organisation_id.description: ID of the internal organisation reference.

tx_teid_data_plane.description: Tunnel ID for the current PDP Context user plane.

tx_teid_control_plane.description: Tunnel ID for the current PDP Context control plane.

gtp_version.description: Version of the used GPRS Tunneling Protocol (GTP).

nsapi.description: ID of the used Network Service Access Point Identifier (NSAPI).

sgsn_control_plane_ip_address.description: IP address of the Serving GPRS Support Node (SGSN) for the control plane.

sgsn_data_plane_ip_address.description: IP address of the Serving GPRS Support Node (SGSN) for the user data plane.

ggsn_control_plane_ip_address.description: IP address of the Gateway GPRS Support Node (GGSN) for the control plane.

ggsn_data_plane_ip_address.description: IP address of the Gateway GPRS Support Node (GGSN) for the user data plane.

created.description: Timestamp when the PDP Context was created.

gtp_v1_uli.description: GTP V1 User Location Information. Cannot be returned with both gtp_v1_uli and gtp_v2_uli. Only one is returned.

gtp_v2_uli.description: GTP V2 User Location Information. Cannot be returned with both gtp_v1_uli and gtp_v2_uli. Only one is returned.

ue_ip_address.description: IP address of the device using the SIM.

imeisv.description: IMEISV of the device with the SIM.

rat_type.description: Describes the Radio Access Technology used in the PDP Context.

SimsPdpContext.description: Information about the current PDP Context of the SIM.

SimsConnectivityDetail.description: Information about the current SIM connectivity status, location and PDP Context of a SIM.

id.description:
Numerical identifier for the type of source address of an SMS.
  • 145 - International
  • 161 - National
  • 208 - Alphanumeric

SMSMessage.title: SMS Message Object
SMSMessage.description: SMS message object used to describe an SMS message.

source_address.description: The source address of the SMS. This value can be set to any number as it is not used.

payload.description: The content body of the SMS message.

udh.description: The optional User Data Header (UDH) encoded as a hex-String can be used to concatenate SMS messages.

dcs.description: The optional Data Coding Scheme (DCS) can be used for setting the message body format to HEX String or normal Text Mode.

expiry_date.description: Expiry Date of the sent SMS in ISO8601 (RFC3339) format.

id.description: The Country's id. The id is the same as in the legacy system. 0 represents the "ANY"-country.

country_code.description: The international phone number prefix. “49” is the one for Germany, “381” is the one for Serbia.

mcc.description: An MCC (Mobile Country Code) is used in combination with an MNC (a combination known as an "MCC/MNC tuple") to uniquely identify a mobile network operator (carrier) using the GSM (including GSM-R), UMTS, LTE, and 5G public land mobile networks.

volume.description:
Amount left i.e. still available for use:
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.
- can be negative

total_volume.description:
Initially provisioned volume or (in case the quota was topped up) the remaining volume at that time plus the
volume of the topup.
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.

accumulated_total_volume.description: Sum of initially provisioned volume and all topup volumes.

last_volume_added.description:
Last volume amount added:
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.

threshold_percentage.description: Percentage of the [total_volume] for triggering a threshold event.  The threshold event is triggered when the remaining volume reaches or falls below this percentage.

threshold_volume.description:
Calculated upon quota creation and upon quota topup as [total_volume] * [threshold_percentage]:
- for SMS: the quantity/number of short messages
- for Data: the amount of data traffic in megabytes. 1 megabyte = 1024 kilobytes.
